title: Upper Bound
text: Home * Search * Score * Upper Bound There are two semantics inside an Alpha-Beta like search, related to Upper Bounds : Beta is an Upper Bound of a score for this node . An Upper Bound is returned from an Alpha-Beta like search, if it fails low . All moves were searched, but none improved alpha . The node searched was a confirmed All-Node .
